data.description: Microsoft creates 6,000-worker unit to help clients with AI.

data.title: King Risk Partners Strengthens Specialty Capabilities and New York Expansion with Intermarket Insurance Agency
data.description: In Gainesville, Florida on July 2, 2026, King Risk Partners revealed their acquisition of Intermarket Insurance Agency, an independent insurance agency located in Northport, New York. King Risk Partners, currently recognized as the 51st largest insurance brokerage firm in the U.S., aims to enhance its operations through this newly formed partnership with Intermarket Insurance Agency.

data.title: Fortinet to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Fortinet, a leading cybersecurity company (NASDAQ: FTNT), will host a conference call on July 29 at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2026. This event will provide insights into the company's results during this period.

data.title: LKQ Corporation to Release Second Quarter 2026 Results on Thursday, July 30, 2026
data.description: In Antioch, Tennessee, on July 2, 2026, LKQ Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as LKQ, announced that it is scheduled to unveil its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2026 on Thursday, July 30, 2026.

data.title: Prophet Trade AI (OTC:RWGI) Announces Development Initiative for Proprietary Gold and Silver Trading Platform
data.description: Prophet Trade AI revealed plans for a new project focused on creating a unique trading platform exclusively for gold and silver commodities. The initiative, undertaken by the company trading under the ticker symbol OTC:RWGI, marks a significant step forward in their strategic development. This specialized platform is set to offer cutting-edge features tailored to the trading of these precious metals, with the aim of providing enhanced opportunities for investors interested in this market.

data.title: Moomoo Canada Expands Greater Toronto Area Presence with New Flagship Store
data.description: The prominent U.S. stock and options trading platform, Moomoo Financial Canada, is preparing to launch their second flagship store at CF Markville, offering services to Canadian customers.

data.title: TEN Ltd. Declares Dividend on its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares
data.description: Athens, Greece - Today, TEN Ltd. (NYSE: TEN), a notable tanker and LNG operator, disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved the regular quarterly cash dividend for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares (NYSE: TENPRF). The declared dividend amounts to around $0.59375 per share. This announcement signifies the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders in the form of dividends on a consistent basis.

data.title: Lucas GC Limited Provides Updates on Its Financing Plans
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Lucas GC Limited (NASDAQ: LGCL) disclosed new information regarding their financing plans. The company, known for its AI technology-driven Platform-as-a-Service solutions in the human resources and insurance sectors, provided updates on their financial strategies.

data.title: ASUS and Republic of Gamers Win 43 Red Dot Product Design Awards 2026
data.description: In 2026, ASUS and ROG have been honored with a total of 43 Red Dot Product Design Awards. The ROG Falcata and Zephyrus Duo models stood out by winning the Best of the Best award in five different categories.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises Ahead Of Key Jobs Report; Tesla Deliveries Due (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a positive increase in anticipation of the upcoming jobs report. The stock of Tesla also saw a rise as delivery figures are expected to be released. The Dow Jones index rose, reflecting a positive sentiment in the market as investors awaited crucial economic data. Tesla's stock also climbed in anticipation of the delivery numbers. This live coverage captured the latest market movements and highlights the growing optimism among investors.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
data.description: The stock market experienced a decline due to the impact of Meta's recent activities on SpaceX, Micron, and various AI-related stocks. Tesla is on the verge of reaching a buy point as it prepares for upcoming deliveries. Additionally, market watchers are anticipating the release of the June jobs report. Despite this, Dow Jones futures show a positive trend, with focus on Tesla's performance and the imminent jobs report.

data.title: Former solicitor and golf coach launches Clear The Shot on decision-making under pressure
data.description: David A. Graham, leveraging his experiences in law and professional golf coaching, recently released Clear The Shot, a comprehensive manual outlining strategic mental approaches for competitive golfers. The paperback edition became available for purchase globally on June 30, 2026. The book hit the market in HEXHAM, England, with the announcement made on July 2, 2026 via PRNewswire.

data.title: GARAGE GOES BIG IN NYC: FLATIRON JUST GOT A LOT HOTTER
data.description: On July 2, 2026, GARAGE, a brand originating from Montréal, announced its plan to expand into New York City after successfully establishing a presence in London. This expansion marks a significant step for the brand as it ventures into one of the leading fashion hubs globally. GARAGE revealed its intention to inaugurate its most extensive and engaging retail flagship yet in New York City, indicating a considerable growth trajectory for the company.

data.title: Jim and Mary Rogers Donates Historic IMSA GT Competitor to Philadelphia Museum Collection
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Philadelphia, the Simeone Foundation Automotive Museum revealed the addition of a 1987 Jaguar XJR-7 to its esteemed collection. This car, generously donated by Jim Rogers from Vero Beach, Florida, enhances the museum's already impressive assortment of sports and racing vehicles. The museum, known for housing one of the most notable collections of its kind globally, continues to expand its offerings for visitors and car enthusiasts alike.
